overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing two characters walking through a mountainous valley at night. The player character follows an NPC companion while holding a lantern that illuminates the path ahead, transitioning from grassy terrain to rocky mountain trails.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow mountain valley with rock walls

agents.ego_description: following the NPC companion through the valley while holding a lantern that illuminates the path

notable_agents.action: walking steadily ahead leading the way through the valley

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face forming the right side of the valley
grassy rock slope rising on the left side of the path
snow-capped mountain peak visible in the distance ahead
scattered pine trees along the valley floor and ridges

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a narrow mountain valley at night with steep rock walls on both sides. The player character follows an NPC companion along a dirt path, holding a lantern that casts light on the ground ahead. Pine trees are scattered in the distance and a mountain peak is visible far ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain trail with steep cliff

events.description: path transitions from grassy dirt to rocky stone surface as terrain becomes steeper

agents.ego_description: climbing the rocky incline while maintaining pace behind the NPC companion

notable_agents.action: navigating the rocky terrain and leading the ascent

entered.detail: steep rock face rising immediately adjacent to the path
scattered large boulders on the left side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The terrain shifts to a rocky mountain trail with a steep cliff face on the right side. The ground becomes covered in gravel and stone rather than dirt. The mountain peak that was ahead is now visible to the left as the path curves. The player continues following the NPC up the incline, with the lantern illuminating the rocky path ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow mountain valley at night as the path leads deeper toward a distant peak. It begins with the player character following an NPC companion along a dirt trail, where a handheld lantern casts a warm, flickering glow on the ground. As the camera advances, the perspective emphasizes the oppressive scale of the steep rock walls flanking both sides of the passage. The scene then opens up slightly to reveal scattered pine trees in the darkness before finally centering on a solitary mountain peak visible far ahead in the distance.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as the path transitions from soft earth to a rugged, ascending mountain trail. It begins with the terrain shifting into a rocky incline, where the ground becomes covered in gravel and stone. As the camera follows the NPC upward, the view opens to reveal a steep cliff face looming on the right side. The scene then curves, bringing a distant mountain peak into view on the left while the lantern continues to cast a glow over the stony path ahead.
